title: aeschynomene fluminensis var. tuberculata
intro: Aeschynomene fluminensis var. tuberculata is a plant species belonging to the legume family, commonly known as "tubercled lotus" due to its unique tubercled seeds. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Aeschynomene fluminensis var. tuberculata include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions, while also being used as an antiseptic and astringent. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or poultices, and are often used in traditional Brazilian medicine to promote overall well-being.
